overall.description: Gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character with a flashlight and handgun exploring dark indoor environments. The character searches a bedroom, interacts with an NPC police officer in an office, traverses a balcony, and navigates a graffiti-covered subway tunnel.

scene_state.functional_zone: small bedroom with mattress and minimal furniture

events.description: character exits the bedroom through the doorway into a dark corridor

agents.ego_description: cautiously moving around the bed with flashlight and pistol drawn, searching the small room and checking corners

small wooden chair with items on the seat
small round table with objects on top
dark doorway leading to the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character explores a cramped, dimly lit bedroom illuminated only by flashlight. A mattress lies against the wall near a small wooden chair and table. The character circles the bed cautiously before exiting through the doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark maintenance corridor with chain-link fencing

events.description: passing through a chain-link fence gate into a larger secured area

agents.ego_description: moving through dark narrow corridors and passing through a chain-link fence gate into an office area

tall chain-link fencing lining both sides of the corridor
doorway leading to a lit office room

segments.scene_description: The character moves through dark maintenance corridors lined with chain-link fencing. Passing through a metal gate, the character approaches a doorway with light emanating from an office space ahead.

character shakes hands with the police officer NPC

agents.ego_description: approaching a police officer standing by the desk, engaging in dialogue, and shaking hands before turning to leave

metal office desk cluttered with papers and equipment

office chair near the desk

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dimly lit office with yellow overhead lighting where a police officer stands by a metal desk. The character approaches the NPC, engages in conversation with on-screen dialogue options, shakes hands, then turns and exits the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: emergency exit corridor leading to outdoor balcony

events.description: entering corridor illuminated by red emergency exit lighting
exiting the building onto an outdoor balcony with night visibility

agents.ego_description: moving through the red-lit emergency corridor, pushing through the exit door, crossing the balcony, and entering another doorway

entered.detail: illuminated red exit sign above the doorway
metal safety railing along the balcony edge
chain-link fence on the balcony perimeter
dark doorway leading back into the building

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow corridor lit by red emergency lights, passes under an exit sign, and steps onto an outdoor balcony with metal railings. After a brief moment outside, the character enters another dark doorway leading to a different interior section.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned subway tunnel with graffiti-covered walls

events.description: entering the abandoned subway tunnel with tiled walls
character ascends a flight of concrete stairs in the tunnel

agents.ego_description: cautiously walking through the debris-filled subway tunnel, illuminating graffiti-covered walls with the flashlight, ascending stairs, and approaching a locked metal gate

entered.detail: white ceramic subway tiles covering the tunnel walls
colorful graffiti and street art covering the walls
scattered rubble and trash on the tunnel floor
concrete stairs with yellow safety stripes leading upward
locked metal security gate blocking the tunnel end
exposed pipes and conduits running along the tunnel ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character explores a long abandoned subway tunnel illuminated by flashlight, revealing graffiti-covered tile walls and debris on the floor. The character ascends a flight of concrete stairs and approaches a locked metal security gate at the tunnel's end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic residential room through industrial corridors and into a desolate underground transit system. It begins in a cramped, dimly lit bedroom where a flashlight illuminates a mattress and wooden furniture before the camera moves through a doorway into dark maintenance halls lined with chain-link fencing. As the camera passes through a metal gate, the scene shifts into a yellow-lit office for a brief encounter and handshake with a police officer, then transitions through a narrow corridor bathed in red emergency light toward an outdoor balcony. After stepping back inside through another dark doorway, the environment opens into a long, abandoned subway tunnel characterized by graffiti-covered tiles and debris. The movement finally concludes as the camera ascends a flight of concrete stairs to reach a locked metal security gate at the tunnel's end.
